titleStmt.title: SII 37.303: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 303. (A.R. No. B 409 of 1940-41.) Pedda-Dudyāla, Jammalamaḍugu Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab in the compound of the Chennakēśava temple.
This is dated Śaka 1625, Svabhānu, Bhādrapada ba. 5, corresponding to 1703 A.D., September 19, Sunday.

It records the renewal of a grant formerly made by the members of the merchant guild of the 56 countries who were well versed in the Sajana-Śivā-chāra headed by Rīti Chennamallappa for offerings and worship of god Varadarāja of Dudēla, the original grant having been lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śata varaṣaṁbulu 1625 Agunēṭṭi svabhānu saṁvvatsa
ra bhādrapada ba 5 lu . śrīmadakhilāṁḍakōṭi braṁhaṁḍa nāyakulayina dudela varadarājasvāmiki taḷige dīpārādha
na kaiṁkarya nimittaṁ śrīmattu sajana śidha śivācāra saṁppaṁnulaina mallela staḷa parastaḷaṁ rīti caṁnnamallappa modalaina yābhayi yāru dēśālavāru
nnu ciṁ ttakuṁṭa samutulōnu maghaṁ nirnayaṁ cēśi yicina dānapatraṁ . pūrvamaṁddu taḷige dīpārādhanaku suṁkhaṁ tiri nagalu vakka mi
riyaṁ dūdi pogāku modalayina rasavargālaku nagavaka 1 ki ka 2 lekhanu divasamu nagalaku kālinagaku ka
ga 1 ki ka 2 lekhanu yī prakāraṁ nirnnayaṁ śēśi Ici vuṁḍri ganaka Ānāḍu Icina dānapatraṁ . pōIvuṁḍe ganaka
yipuḍu yābhaiyāru dēśālavāru niṁrnayaṁ śēśi Icinā dānapatraṁ . Icināru ganaka tappaka naḍapiṁ
cagalavāru yābhaIyāru dēśāla vāri śelavuna rīti caṁnnamallappavappitaṁ . svadattā The inscription stops abruptly
Digital edition of SII 37.303 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
